tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
edit 2
set name "lan-to-proxy-allow"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port2"
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "squid-proxy"
set action accept
set schedule "always"
set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
set nat disable
set comments "Allow LAN hosts to reach proxy only for web"
next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
edit 4
set name "allow-lan-to-internet-other"

set dstintf "port1"

set dstaddr "all"
set action accept
set schedule "always"
set service "PING" "DNS" "HTTP" "HTTPS" "ALL"

end"}
